Open for new opportunties beginning March 2019

Feb 17, 2019

After 12 months with the team at Field tackling the challenges of Vaccine delivery logistics across Africa, it’s time to move on and I’ll be leaving in a few weeks to explore new pastures.

That means starting mid March I’ll be available for hire and open to new opportunities.

I enjoy working with React and in particular JAM Stacks and have a wealth of experience building Web Sites and Web & Mobile Apps. For more in depth info there’s a bunch over at my LinkedIn profile or feel free to reach out and I’ll be happy to send you a CV/Résumé.

I generally work Freelance, but I’m also open to conversations around full-time employee opportunties. I enjoy working both remotely and in awesome work spaces. If you think I might make a great addition to your team or would like to reach out for any other reason it would be great to hear from you.
